content.text: <ide_opened_file>The user opened the file /Users/actio/codebase/datastoria/package-lock.json in the IDE. This may or may not be related to the current task.</ide_opened_file>
fix merge conflict with packagelock file

content.thinking:
The user wants to fix a merge conflict in the package-lock.json file. I can see from the git status that `package-lock.json` has a `UU` status, which means it has unresolved merge conflicts.

Let me check the current state of the conflict and resolve it.

content.text: Let me check the current merge conflict state.

input.description: List files with unresolved merge conflicts
Count merge conflict markers in package-lock.json

content.text: There are 9 conflict markers in `package-lock.json`. The cleanest way to resolve a `package-lock.json` conflict is to accept one side and regenerate it.

input.description: Accept theirs for package-lock.json and regenerate with npm install

content.text:
Done. Resolved `package-lock.json` by accepting the incoming version and regenerating it with `npm install`, then staged it.

Note: there are still 2 other files with merge conflicts: [app-sidebar.tsx](src/components/app-sidebar.tsx) and [dashboard-panel-container.tsx](src/components/shared/dashboard/dashboard-panel-container.tsx). Want me to resolve those too?
